query: SELECT m.lineDescription, m.unitPrice, m.quantity FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.matchedItemName IN ('Milk 3.25%', 'Butter') AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 ORDER BY m.matchedItemName, m.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT m.lineDescription, m.unitPrice, m.quantity FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.matchedItemName IN ('Milk 3.25%', 'Butter') AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 ORDER BY m.matchedItemName, m.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 20;
